# TradePulse

> TradePulse is the voice-powered trade journal for active crypto traders. Speak your trade —
> token, entry, exit, chain, PnL, and mood — and AI logs it in under 5 seconds. Built for
> on-chain Solana/Ethereum/memecoin traders whose DEX trades don't come from a broker API.
> $99 one-time (lifetime), no subscription; 20 free trades, no account or credit card required.

## What it is
- Voice-first: tap the mic, speak naturally, AI parses every field. No forms, no typing.
- Multi-chain: Solana, Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, BNB/BSC, Polygon.
- Tracks entries, exits, PnL, win rate, time-of-day, and trading mood/psychology.
- Free tier stores trades locally on your device; optional cloud sync for Pro.
- Pricing: $99 one-time lifetime ($99 founding price, rising to $149 after the first 10
  customers). Paid in SOL or USDC. No subscription. 14-day money-back guarantee.
- Privacy: voice is transcribed by your browser's Web Speech API; audio never touches our
  servers; only the text transcript is sent to Anthropic for parsing.
- Independent indie project by TheVeinGhost, a trader in Connecticut. 50% of every Pro
  upgrade is donated to three Connecticut organizations.

## Key pages
